puzzle.hint: A reminder that wealth and loved ones are a trial and test from Allah, who holds an immense reward for the patient.
puzzle.arabic: وَٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌۭ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: And know that your properties and your children are but a trial and that Allāh has with Him a great reward.
